'''rarotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kacha|kacha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kacha|kacha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rarotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræretheth|ræretheth]] || [[word:rærethej|rærethej]] || [[word:rærethesh|rærethesh]] || [[word:rærethe|rærethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rarorothoth|rarorothoth]] || [[word:rarorothoj|rarorothoj]] || [[word:rarorothosh|rarorothosh]] || [[word:rarorotho|rarorotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rarothoth|rarothoth]] || [[word:rarothoj|rarothoj]] || [[word:rarothosh|rarothosh]] || [[word:rarotho|rarotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rarofthofth|rarofthofth]] || [[word:rarofthofj|rarofthofj]] || [[word:rarofthofsh|rarofthofsh]] || [[word:rarofthof|rarofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rarothotho|rarothotho]] || [[word:rarothojo|rarothojo]] || [[word:rarothosho|rarothosho]] || [[word:rarothoko|rarothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rarothoth|rarothoth]] || [[word:rarothoj|rarothoj]] || [[word:rarothosh|rarothosh]] || [[word:rarotho|rarotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rarothothol|rarothothol]] || [[word:rarothojol|rarothojol]] || [[word:rarothoshol|rarothoshol]] || [[word:rarothokol|rarothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rarothoothotho|rarothoothotho]] || [[word:rarothoojojo|rarothoojojo]] || [[word:rarothooshosho|rarothooshosho]] || [[word:rarothooko|rarothooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rarothothon|rarothothon]] || [[word:rarothojon|rarothojon]] || [[word:rarothoshon|rarothoshon]] || [[word:rarothokon|rarothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rarothothooro|rarothothooro]] || [[word:rarothojooro|rarothojooro]] || [[word:rarothoshooro|rarothoshooro]] || [[word:rarothokooro|rarothokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|8a892ea}}
